summary: Gruber announces the release of SmartyPants 1.4.1, a minor bug-fix update to his typographic punctuation plugin. The release fixes a previously broken patch for dashes followed by quotes without intervening spaces, and adds support for treating   as whitespace. He credits Greg Knauss for contributing a patch.
key_points: SmartyPants 1.4.1 is a minor bug-fix release with no new features
Fixes a regression where the 1.4 dash-and-quote bug fix didn't actually work
Adds   recognition as whitespace for correct typographic handling
money_quotes: The bug fix from 1.4 for dashes followed by quotes with no intervening spaces now actually works.
key_insight: Even small typographic tools require careful attention to edge cases like whitespace handling to produce correct results.
